name: block_tetris
description:
10000 - Start
12001 - Add js events
12001 - Add Ads PopUp events
12001 - deleted 2/3 of the music, made the sounds quieter
12001 - Add Rewarded
12201 - add js events lose,restart
12301 - Fix loading number, optimize images
12401 - Fix position JS Popup
12503 - fixed a bug with lines not being counted
12504 - Added tutorials, added a check of 1000 points scored to open the advanced mode.

12601 - Added new block mechanics. The circular bar has been replaced when losing.

12602 - Set up a dynamic table of weights, replace effect parts with sprites, set up menu transitions

20001 - The figures for the placement have been increased, the accumulation of combos has been changed for the classic mode, with the possibility of 2 passes between the lines

20002 - add global sound
20003 - new musik
